queries.question: Show the Warner Bros produced films that are either mysteries or thrillers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movie.Title 
FROM Movie
WHERE (Movie.Crime_Fiction = "Mystery" OR Movie.Crime_Fiction = "Thriller") AND Movie.Studio = "Warner Bros"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?movie p:Crime_Fiction ?crime_fiction_w .
  ?movie p:Crime_Fiction ?crime_fiction_w2 .
  ?movie p:Studio ?studio_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?crime_fiction_w) = "Mystery" || STR(?crime_fiction_w2) = "Thriller")) && STR(?studio_w) = "Warner Bros"))
}

queries.question: Show all the mystery films, then also show the thrillers from Warner Bros.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movie.Title 
FROM Movie
WHERE Movie.Crime_Fiction = "Mystery" OR Movie.Crime_Fiction = "Thriller" AND Movie.Studio = "Warner Bros"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?movie p:Crime_Fiction ?crime_fiction_w .
  ?movie p:Crime_Fiction ?crime_fiction_w2 .
  ?movie p:Studio ?studio_w .
  FILTER((STR(?crime_fiction_w) = "Mystery" || (STR(?crime_fiction_w2) = "Thriller" && STR(?studio_w) = "Warner Bros")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide me with the mysteries and thrillers from Warner Bros studio.
